title: GSD-Docs Typicals Catalog Schema
description: JSON schema defining the structure of project-specific typicals catalogs. Projects create their own CATALOG.json matching this schema. Consumed by /doc:generate-sds workflow for typical matching and SDS content generation.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema format. Allows future evolution without breaking existing catalogs. Current: 1.0

library.description: Metadata about the typicals library. Identifies which library version this catalog describes.

name.description: Human-readable library name. Examples: 'Acme Corp Standard Library', 'Customer XYZ Typicals', 'Internal Control Modules v3'

version.description: Library version following semantic versioning (e.g., '2.3.1') or custom scheme (e.g., 'V18_2024-Q2')

platform.description: Target PLC platform and minimum version. Examples: 'TIA Portal V18', 'TIA Portal V17 SP2', 'TIA Portal V19'

updated.description: Last update date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Used to track library freshness.

load_mode.description: How this library is loaded. 'external': referenced via path in PROJECT.md (shared library). 'imported': copied into project references/ folder (self-contained).

path.description: File system path to library if load_mode is 'external'. Omit for imported libraries.

typicals.description: List of all typicals (function blocks) available in this library. Each typical represents a control module building block.

id.description: Unique identifier for this typical. Usually matches FB name. Examples: 'FB_AnalogIn', 'FB_ValveCtrl', 'FB_MotorCtrl'

type.description: Typical classification. Standard types align with ISA-88/PackML concepts.

category.description: Functional category for grouping. Examples: 'Analog I/O', 'Valves', 'Motors', 'Conveyors', 'Safety'

description.description: Brief functional description. One sentence explaining what this typical does. Will appear in SDS typical assignment tables.

interfaces.description: Input and output interfaces for this typical. Used for matching equipment modules based on I/O requirements.

inputs.description: Input parameters and signals for this FB.

description.description: Optional description of this input's purpose.

outputs.description: Output parameters and signals from this FB.

description.description: Optional description of this output's purpose.

use_cases.description: Common use cases or equipment types where this typical applies. Used by matching algorithm. Examples: ['Temperature sensors', 'Pressure transmitters', 'Level sensors']

states.description: Operating states if this typical implements a state machine (PackML-compatible typicals). Optional for simple I/O typicals.

name.description: State name. Use PackML standard names where applicable: IDLE, STARTING, EXECUTE, STOPPING, ABORTING, etc.

description.description: Brief description of what happens in this state.

documentation.description: Optional path to detailed documentation for this typical (PDF, DOCX, or HTML). Relative to library root or absolute path.

example.description: Example CATALOG.json entry showing a complete typical definition for FB_AnalogIn

typicals.description: Processes analog input signals with scaling, filtering, and alarm limits. Supports 4-20mA and 0-10V sensors.

inputs.name: RawValue
inputs.description: Raw ADC value from PLC input card (0-27648 for 4-20mA)

inputs.name: ScaleLow
inputs.description: Engineering unit value at 4mA (e.g., 0.0 for 0-100°C range)

inputs.name: ScaleHigh
inputs.description: Engineering unit value at 20mA (e.g., 100.0 for 0-100°C range)

inputs.name: AlarmHigh
inputs.description: High alarm limit in engineering units

inputs.name: AlarmLow
inputs.description: Low alarm limit in engineering units

inputs.name: FilterTime
inputs.description: First-order filter time constant in seconds (0 = no filtering)

outputs.name: Value
outputs.description: Scaled and filtered value in engineering units

outputs.name: AlarmHighActive
outputs.description: TRUE when value exceeds AlarmHigh threshold

outputs.name: AlarmLowActive
outputs.description: TRUE when value falls below AlarmLow threshold

outputs.name: Status
outputs.description: Status bits: bit 0 = Valid, bit 1 = Error, bit 2 = Out of Range
